body:
Fix integration tests in `github.com/grafana/grafana/pkg/services/anonymous/anonimpl` when running on Spanner.

Spanner supports INSERT OR UPDATE statement but only when the conflict is on primary key, so we need to use SELECT plus INSERT or UPDATE ourselves.

Fixes `TestIntegrationDeviceService_tag`, `TestIntegrationDeviceService_SearchDevice`, `TestIntegrationAnonDeviceService_DeviceLimitWithCache`, `TestIntegrationAnonStore_DeleteDevicesOlderThan`, `TestIntegrationBeyondDeviceLimit` and `TestIntegrationAnonStore_DeleteDevice`.
title: spanner: Fix insert or update in anon_device when running on Spanner.
